steps.title: Supply the missing subject
steps.content: After the opening modifier, the sentence needs a subject for have missed. The intended subject is many critics, who have focused on Western sources but have missed Kurosawa's Japanese artistic traditions.

steps.title: Reject awkward subjects
steps.content: B makes Kurosawa's use of sources the subject and leaves who to do the missing action. C creates a wordy there construction and repeats the subject with they. D creates a semicolon splice around they. The answer is A.
